description: Analyze one evaluated subject scenario from generated eval artifacts.

kind.description: Evaluation kind: skills, agents, or recipes

hash.description: Content hash directory for the subject

steps.title: Analyze {{kind}}/{{subject}} eval-{{eval_id}}
steps.description: Run `python scripts/analyze-skill-eval-results.py --workspace-root {{workspace_root}} --skill {{subject}} --hash {{hash}} --scenario {{eval_id}}`, inspect analysis.md/json and sequence.mmd, then summarize bad actions, blockage, root cause, and recommendations.
